text: polymerōs kai polytropōs palai o theos lalēsas tois patrasin en tois prophētais ep eschatōn tōn ēmerōn toutōn elalēsen ēmin en uiō
on ethēken klēronomon pantōn di ou kai tous aiōnas epoiēsen

os ōn apaugasma tēs doxēs kai charaktēr tēs ypostaseōs autou pherōn te ta panta tō rēmati tēs dynameōs autou di eautou katharismon poiēsamenos tōn amartiōn ēmōn ekathisen en dexia tēs megalōsynēs en ypsēlois
tosoutō kreittōn genomenos tōn angelōn osō diaphorōteron par autous keklēronomēken onoma
tini gar eipen pote tōn angelōn uios mou ei sy egō sēmeron gegennēka se kai palin egō esomai autō eis patera kai autos estai moi eis uion
otan de palin eisagagē ton prōtotokon eis tēn oikoumenēn legei kai proskynēsatōsan autō pantes angeloi theou
kai pros men tous angelous legei o poiōn tous angelous autou pneumata kai tous leitourgous autou pyros phloga
pros de ton uion o thronos sou o theos eis ton aiōna tou aiōnos rabdos euthytētos ē rabdos tēs basileias sou
ēgapēsas dikaiosynēn kai emisēsas anomian dia touto echrisen se o theos o theos sou elaion agalliaseōs para tous metochous sou
kai sy kat archas kyrie tēn gēn ethemeliōsas kai erga tōn cheirōn sou eisin oi ouranoi
autoi apolountai sy de diameneis kai pantes ōs imation palaiōthēsontai
kai ōsei peribolaion elixeis autous kai allagēsontai sy de o autos ei kai ta etē sou ouk ekleipsousin
pros tina de tōn angelōn eirēken pote kathou ek dexiōn mou eōs an thō tous echthrous sou ypopodion tōn podōn sou
ouchi pantes eisin leitourgika pneumata eis diakonian apostellomena dia tous mellontas klēronomein sōtērian
dia touto dei perissoterōs ēmas prosechein tois akoustheisin mēpote pararryōmen
ei gar o di angelōn lalētheis logos egeneto bebaios kai pasa parabasis kai parakoē elaben endikon misthapodosian
pōs ēmeis ekpheuxometha tēlikautēs amelēsantes sōtērias ētis archēn labousa laleisthai dia tou kyriou ypo tōn akousantōn eis ēmas ebebaiōthē
synepimartyrountos tou theou sēmeiois te kai terasin kai poikilais dynamesin kai pneumatos agiou merismois kata tēn autou thelēsin
ou gar angelois ypetaxen tēn oikoumenēn tēn mellousan peri ēs laloumen
diemartyrato de pou tis legōn ti estin anthrōpos oti mimnēskē autou ē uios anthrōpou oti episkeptē auton
ēlattōsas auton brachy ti par angelous doxē kai timē estephanōsas auton kai katestēsas auton epi ta erga tōn cheirōn sou
panta ypetaxas ypokatō tōn podōn autou en gar tō ypotaxai autō ta panta ouden aphēken autō anypotakton nyn de oupō orōmen autō ta panta ypotetagmena
ton de brachy ti par angelous ēlattōmenon blepomen iēsoun dia to pathēma tou thanatou doxē kai timē estephanōmenon opōs chariti theou yper pantos geusētai thanatou
eprepen gar autō di on ta panta kai di ou ta panta pollous uious eis doxan agagonta ton archēgon tēs sōtērias autōn dia pathēmatōn teleiōsai
o te gar agiazōn kai oi agiazomenoi ex enos pantes di ēn aitian ouk epaischynetai adelphous autous kalein
legōn apangelō to onoma sou tois adelphois mou en mesō ekklēsias ymnēsō se
kai palin egō esomai pepoithōs ep autō kai palin idou egō kai ta paidia a moi edōken o theos
epei oun ta paidia kekoinōnēken sarkos kai aimatos kai autos paraplēsiōs meteschen tōn autōn ina dia tou thanatou katargēsē ton to kratos echonta tou thanatou tout estin ton diabolon
kai apallaxē toutous osoi phobō thanatou dia pantos tou zēn enochoi ēsan douleias
ou gar dēpou angelōn epilambanetai alla spermatos abraam epilambanetai
othen ōpheilen kata panta tois adelphois omoiōthēnai ina eleēmōn genētai kai pistos archiereus ta pros ton theon eis to ilaskesthai tas amartias tou laou
en ō gar peponthen autos peirastheis dynatai tois peirazomenois boēthēsai
othen adelphoi agioi klēseōs epouraniou metochoi katanoēsate ton apostolon kai archierea tēs omologias ēmōn christon iēsoun
piston onta tō poiēsanti auton ōs kai mōsēs en olō tō oikō autou
pleionos gar doxēs outos para mōsēn ēxiōtai kath oson pleiona timēn echei tou oikou o kataskeuasas auton
pas gar oikos kataskeuazetai ypo tinos o de ta panta kataskeuasas theos
kai mōsēs men pistos en olō tō oikō autou ōs therapōn eis martyrion tōn lalēthēsomenōn
christos de ōs uios epi ton oikon autou ou oikos esmen ēmeis eanper tēn parrēsian kai to kauchēma tēs elpidos mechri telous bebaian kataschōmen
dio kathōs legei to pneuma to agion sēmeron ean tēs phōnēs autou akousēte
mē sklērynēte tas kardias ymōn ōs en tō parapikrasmō kata tēn ēmeran tou peirasmou en tē erēmō
ou epeirasan me oi pateres ymōn edokimasan me kai eidon ta erga mou tessarakonta etē
dio prosōchthisa tē genea ekeinē kai eipon aei planōntai tē kardia autoi de ouk egnōsan tas odous mou
ōs ōmosa en tē orgē mou ei eiseleusontai eis tēn katapausin mou
blepete adelphoi mēpote estai en tini ymōn kardia ponēra apistias en tō apostēnai apo theou zōntos
alla parakaleite eautous kath ekastēn ēmeran achris ou to sēmeron kaleitai ina mē sklērynthē tis ex ymōn apatē tēs amartias
metochoi gar gegonamen tou christou eanper tēn archēn tēs ypostaseōs mechri telous bebaian kataschōmen
en tō legesthai sēmeron ean tēs phōnēs autou akousēte mē sklērynēte tas kardias ymōn ōs en tō parapikrasmō
tines gar akousantes parepikranan all ou pantes oi exelthontes ex aigyptou dia mōseōs
tisin de prosōchthisen tessarakonta etē ouchi tois amartēsasin ōn ta kōla epesen en tē erēmō
tisin de ōmosen mē eiseleusesthai eis tēn katapausin autou ei mē tois apeithēsasin
kai blepomen oti ouk ēdynēthēsan eiselthein di apistian
phobēthōmen oun mēpote kataleipomenēs epangelias eiselthein eis tēn katapausin autou dokē tis ex ymōn ysterēkenai
kai gar esmen euēngelismenoi kathaper kakeinoi all ouk ōphelēsen o logos tēs akoēs ekeinous mē synkekramenos tē pistei tois akousasin
eiserchometha gar eis tēn katapausin oi pisteusantes kathōs eirēken ōs ōmosa en tē orgē mou ei eiseleusontai eis tēn katapausin mou kaitoi tōn ergōn apo katabolēs kosmou genēthentōn
eirēken gar pou peri tēs ebdomēs outōs kai katepausen o theos en tē ēmera tē ebdomē apo pantōn tōn ergōn autou
kai en toutō palin ei eiseleusontai eis tēn katapausin mou
epei oun apoleipetai tinas eiselthein eis autēn kai oi proteron euangelisthentes ouk eisēlthon di apeitheian
palin tina orizei ēmeran sēmeron en dabid legōn meta tosouton chronon kathōs eirētai sēmeron ean tēs phōnēs autou akousēte mē sklērynēte tas kardias ymōn
ei gar autous iēsous katepausen ouk an peri allēs elalei meta tauta ēmeras
ara apoleipetai sabbatismos tō laō tou theou
o gar eiselthōn eis tēn katapausin autou kai autos katepausen apo tōn ergōn autou ōsper apo tōn idiōn o theos
spoudasōmen oun eiselthein eis ekeinēn tēn katapausin ina mē en tō autō tis ypodeigmati pesē tēs apeitheias

zōn gar o logos tou theou kai energēs kai tomōteros yper pasan machairan distomon kai diiknoumenos achri merismou psychēs te kai pneumatos armōn te kai myelōn kai kritikos enthymēseōn kai ennoiōn kardias
kai ouk estin ktisis aphanēs enōpion autou panta de gymna kai tetrachēlismena tois ophthalmois autou pros on ēmin o logos
echontes oun archierea megan dielēlythota tous ouranous iēsoun ton uion tou theou kratōmen tēs omologias
ou gar echomen archierea mē dynamenon sympathēsai tais astheneiais ēmōn pepeirasmenon de kata panta kath omoiotēta chōris amartias
proserchōmetha oun meta parrēsias tō thronō tēs charitos ina labōmen eleon kai charin eurōmen eis eukairon boētheian
pas gar archiereus ex anthrōpōn lambanomenos yper anthrōpōn kathistatai ta pros ton theon ina prospherē dōra te kai thysias yper amartiōn
metriopathein dynamenos tois agnoousin kai planōmenois epei kai autos perikeitai astheneian
kai dia tautēn opheilei kathōs peri tou laou outōs kai peri eautou prospherein yper amartiōn
kai ouch eautō tis lambanei tēn timēn alla o kaloumenos ypo tou theou kathaper kai o aarōn
outōs kai o christos ouch eauton edoxasen genēthēnai archierea all o lalēsas pros auton uios mou ei sy egō sēmeron gegennēka se
kathōs kai en eterō legei sy iereus eis ton aiōna kata tēn taxin melchisedek
os en tais ēmerais tēs sarkos autou deēseis te kai iketērias pros ton dynamenon sōzein auton ek thanatou meta kraugēs ischyras kai dakryōn prosenenkas kai eisakoustheis apo tēs eulabeias
kaiper ōn uios emathen aph ōn epathen tēn ypakoēn
kai teleiōtheis egeneto tois ypakouousin autō pasin aitios sōtērias aiōniou
prosagoreutheis ypo tou theou archiereus kata tēn taxin melchisedek
peri ou polys ēmin o logos kai dysermēneutos legein epei nōthroi gegonate tais akoais

kai gar opheilontes einai didaskaloi dia ton chronon palin chreian echete tou didaskein ymas tina ta stoicheia tēs archēs tōn logiōn tou theou kai gegonate chreian echontes galaktos kai ou stereas trophēs
pas gar o metechōn galaktos apeiros logou dikaiosynēs nēpios gar estin
teleiōn de estin ē sterea trophē tōn dia tēn exin ta aisthētēria gegymnasmena echontōn pros diakrisin kalou te kai kakou
dio aphentes ton tēs archēs tou christou logon epi tēn teleiotēta pherōmetha mē palin themelion kataballomenoi metanoias apo nekrōn ergōn kai pisteōs epi theon
baptismōn didachēs epitheseōs te cheirōn anastaseōs te nekrōn kai krimatos aiōniou
kai touto poiēsomen eanper epitrepē o theos
adynaton gar tous apax phōtisthentas geusamenous te tēs dōreas tēs epouraniou kai metochous genēthentas pneumatos agiou
kai kalon geusamenous theou rēma dynameis te mellontos aiōnos
kai parapesontas palin anakainizein eis metanoian anastaurountas eautois ton uion tou theou kai paradeigmatizontas
gē gar ē piousa ton ep autēs pollakis erchomenon yeton kai tiktousa botanēn eutheton ekeinois di ous kai geōrgeitai metalambanei eulogias apo tou theou
ekpherousa de akanthas kai tribolous adokimos kai kataras engys ēs to telos eis kausin
pepeismetha de peri ymōn agapētoi ta kreittona kai echomena sōtērias ei kai outōs laloumen
ou gar adikos o theos epilathesthai tou ergou ymōn kai tou kopou tēs agapēs ēs enedeixasthe eis to onoma autou diakonēsantes tois agiois kai diakonountes
epithymoumen de ekaston ymōn tēn autēn endeiknysthai spoudēn pros tēn plērophorian tēs elpidos achri telous
ina mē nōthroi genēsthe mimētai de tōn dia pisteōs kai makrothymias klēronomountōn tas epangelias
tō gar abraam epangeilamenos o theos epei kat oudenos eichen meizonos omosai ōmosen kath eautou
legōn ē mēn eulogōn eulogēsō se kai plēthynōn plēthynō se
kai outōs makrothymēsas epetychen tēs epangelias
anthrōpoi men gar kata tou meizonos omnyousin kai pasēs autois antilogias peras eis bebaiōsin o orkos
en ō perissoteron boulomenos o theos epideixai tois klēronomois tēs epangelias to ametatheton tēs boulēs autou emesiteusen orkō
ina dia dyo pragmatōn ametathetōn en ois adynaton pseusasthai theon ischyran paraklēsin echōmen oi kataphygontes kratēsai tēs prokeimenēs elpidos
ēn ōs ankyran echomen tēs psychēs asphalē te kai bebaian kai eiserchomenēn eis to esōteron tou katapetasmatos
opou prodromos yper ēmōn eisēlthen iēsous kata tēn taxin melchisedek archiereus genomenos eis ton aiōna
outos gar o melchisedek basileus salēm iereus tou theou ypsistou o synantēsas abraam ypostrephonti apo tēs kopēs tōn basileōn kai eulogēsas auton
ō kai dekatēn apo pantōn emerisen abraam prōton men ermēneuomenos basileus dikaiosynēs epeita de kai basileus salēm o estin basileus eirēnēs
apatōr amētōr agenealogētos mēte archēn ēmerōn mēte zōēs telos echōn aphōmoiōmenos de tō uiō tou theou menei iereus eis to diēnekes
theōreite de pēlikos outos ō kai dekatēn abraam edōken ek tōn akrothiniōn o patriarchēs
kai oi men ek tōn uiōn leui tēn ierateian lambanontes entolēn echousin apodekatoun ton laon kata ton nomon tout estin tous adelphous autōn kaiper exelēlythotas ek tēs osphyos abraam
o de mē genealogoumenos ex autōn dedekatōken ton abraam kai ton echonta tas epangelias eulogēken
chōris de pasēs antilogias to elatton ypo tou kreittonos eulogeitai
kai ōde men dekatas apothnēskontes anthrōpoi lambanousin ekei de martyroumenos oti zē
kai ōs epos eipein dia abraam kai leui o dekatas lambanōn dedekatōtai
eti gar en tē osphui tou patros ēn ote synēntēsen autō o melchisedek
ei men oun teleiōsis dia tēs leuitikēs ierōsynēs ēn o laos gar ep autē nenomothetēto tis eti chreia kata tēn taxin melchisedek eteron anistasthai ierea kai ou kata tēn taxin aarōn legesthai
metatithemenēs gar tēs ierōsynēs ex anankēs kai nomou metathesis ginetai
eph on gar legetai tauta phylēs eteras meteschēken aph ēs oudeis proseschēken tō thysiastēriō
prodēlon gar oti ex iouda anatetalken o kyrios ēmōn eis ēn phylēn ouden peri ierōsynēs mōsēs elalēsen
kai perissoteron eti katadēlon estin ei kata tēn omoiotēta melchisedek anistatai iereus eteros
os ou kata nomon entolēs sarkikēs gegonen alla kata dynamin zōēs akatalytou
martyrei gar oti sy iereus eis ton aiōna kata tēn taxin melchisedek
athetēsis men gar ginetai proagousēs entolēs dia to autēs asthenes kai anōpheles
ouden gar eteleiōsen o nomos epeisagōgē de kreittonos elpidos di ēs engizomen tō theō
kai kath oson ou chōris orkōmosias oi men gar chōris orkōmosias eisin iereis gegonotes
o de meta orkōmosias dia tou legontos pros auton ōmosen kyrios kai ou metamelēthēsetai sy iereus eis ton aiōna kata tēn taxin melchisedek
kata tosouton kreittonos diathēkēs gegonen engyos iēsous
kai oi men pleiones eisin gegonotes iereis dia to thanatō kōlyesthai paramenein
o de dia to menein auton eis ton aiōna aparabaton echei tēn ierōsynēn
othen kai sōzein eis to panteles dynatai tous proserchomenous di autou tō theō pantote zōn eis to entynchanein yper autōn
toioutos gar ēmin eprepen archiereus osios akakos amiantos kechōrismenos apo tōn amartōlōn kai ypsēloteros tōn ouranōn genomenos
os ouk echei kath ēmeran anankēn ōsper oi archiereis proteron yper tōn idiōn amartiōn thysias anapherein epeita tōn tou laou touto gar epoiēsen ephapax eauton anenenkas
o nomos gar anthrōpous kathistēsin archiereis echontas astheneian o logos de tēs orkōmosias tēs meta ton nomon uion eis ton aiōna teteleiōmenon
kephalaion de epi tois legomenois toiouton echomen archierea os ekathisen en dexia tou thronou tēs megalōsynēs en tois ouranois
tōn agiōn leitourgos kai tēs skēnēs tēs alēthinēs ēn epēxen o kyrios kai ouk anthrōpos
pas gar archiereus eis to prospherein dōra te kai thysias kathistatai othen anankaion echein ti kai touton o prosenenkē
ei men gar ēn epi gēs oud an ēn iereus ontōn tōn iereōn tōn prospherontōn kata ton nomon ta dōra
oitines ypodeigmati kai skia latreuousin tōn epouraniōn kathōs kechrēmatistai mōsēs mellōn epitelein tēn skēnēn ora gar phēsin poiēsēs panta kata ton typon ton deichthenta soi en tō orei
nyni de diaphorōteras teteuchen leitourgias osō kai kreittonos estin diathēkēs mesitēs ētis epi kreittosin epangeliais nenomothetētai
ei gar ē prōtē ekeinē ēn amemptos ouk an deuteras ezēteito topos
memphomenos gar autois legei idou ēmerai erchontai legei kyrios kai syntelesō epi ton oikon israēl kai epi ton oikon iouda diathēkēn kainēn

ou kata tēn diathēkēn ēn epoiēsa tois patrasin autōn en ēmera epilabomenou tēs cheiros autōn exagagein autous ek gēs aigyptou oti autoi ouk enemeinan en tē diathēkē mou kagō ēmelēsa autōn legei kyrios

oti autē ē diathēkē ēn diathēsomai tō oikō israēl meta tas ēmeras ekeinas legei kyrios didous nomous mou eis tēn dianoian autōn kai epi kardias autōn epigrapsō autous kai esomai autois eis theon kai autoi esontai moi eis laon
kai ou mē didaxōsin ekastos ton plēsion autou kai ekastos ton adelphon autou legōn gnōthi ton kyrion oti pantes eidēsousin me apo mikrou autōn eōs megalou autōn
oti ileōs esomai tais adikiais autōn kai tōn amartiōn autōn kai tōn anomiōn autōn ou mē mnēsthō eti
en tō legein kainēn pepalaiōken tēn prōtēn to de palaioumenon kai gēraskon engys aphanismou
eichen men oun kai ē prōtē skēnē dikaiōmata latreias to te agion kosmikon
skēnē gar kateskeuasthē ē prōtē en ē ē te lychnia kai ē trapeza kai ē prothesis tōn artōn ētis legetai agia
meta de to deuteron katapetasma skēnē ē legomenē agia agiōn
chrysoun echousa thymiatērion kai tēn kibōton tēs diathēkēs perikekalymmenēn pantothen chrysiō en ē stamnos chrysē echousa to manna kai ē rabdos aarōn ē blastēsasa kai ai plakes tēs diathēkēs
yperanō de autēs cheroubim doxēs kataskiazonta to ilastērion peri ōn ouk estin nyn legein kata meros
toutōn de outōs kateskeuasmenōn eis men tēn prōtēn skēnēn diapantos eisiasin oi iereis tas latreias epitelountes
eis de tēn deuteran apax tou eniautou monos o archiereus ou chōris aimatos o prospherei yper eautou kai tōn tou laou agnoēmatōn
touto dēlountos tou pneumatos tou agiou mēpō pephanerōsthai tēn tōn agiōn odon eti tēs prōtēs skēnēs echousēs stasin
ētis parabolē eis ton kairon ton enestēkota kath on dōra te kai thysiai prospherontai mē dynamenai kata syneidēsin teleiōsai ton latreuonta
monon epi brōmasin kai pomasin kai diaphorois baptismois kai dikaiōmasin sarkos mechri kairou diorthōseōs epikeimena
christos de paragenomenos archiereus tōn mellontōn agathōn dia tēs meizonos kai teleioteras skēnēs ou cheiropoiētou tout estin ou tautēs tēs ktiseōs
oude di aimatos tragōn kai moschōn dia de tou idiou aimatos eisēlthen ephapax eis ta agia aiōnian lytrōsin euromenos
ei gar to aima taurōn kai tragōn kai spodos damaleōs rantizousa tous kekoinōmenous agiazei pros tēn tēs sarkos katharotēta
posō mallon to aima tou christou os dia pneumatos aiōniou eauton prosēnenken amōmon tō theō kathariei tēn syneidēsin ymōn apo nekrōn ergōn eis to latreuein theō zōnti
kai dia touto diathēkēs kainēs mesitēs estin opōs thanatou genomenou eis apolytrōsin tōn epi tē prōtē diathēkē parabaseōn tēn epangelian labōsin oi keklēmenoi tēs aiōniou klēronomias
opou gar diathēkē thanaton anankē pheresthai tou diathemenou
diathēkē gar epi nekrois bebaia epei mēpote ischyei ote zē o diathemenos
othen oud ē prōtē chōris aimatos enkekainistai
lalētheisēs gar pasēs entolēs kata nomon ypo mōyseōs panti tō laō labōn to aima tōn moschōn kai tragōn meta ydatos kai eriou kokkinou kai yssōpou auto te to biblion kai panta ton laon errantisen
legōn touto to aima tēs diathēkēs ēs eneteilato pros ymas o theos
kai tēn skēnēn de kai panta ta skeuē tēs leitourgias tō aimati omoiōs errantisen
kai schedon en aimati panta katharizetai kata ton nomon kai chōris aimatekchysias ou ginetai aphesis
anankē oun ta men ypodeigmata tōn en tois ouranois toutois katharizesthai auta de ta epourania kreittosin thysiais para tautas
ou gar eis cheiropoiēta agia eisēlthen o christos antitypa tōn alēthinōn all eis auton ton ouranon nyn emphanisthēnai tō prosōpō tou theou yper ēmōn
oud ina pollakis prospherē eauton ōsper o archiereus eiserchetai eis ta agia kat eniauton en aimati allotriō
epei edei auton pollakis pathein apo katabolēs kosmou nyn de apax epi synteleia tōn aiōnōn eis athetēsin amartias dia tēs thysias autou pephanerōtai
kai kath oson apokeitai tois anthrōpois apax apothanein meta de touto krisis
outōs o christos apax prosenechtheis eis to pollōn anenenkein amartias ek deuterou chōris amartias ophthēsetai tois auton apekdechomenois eis sōtērian
skian gar echōn o nomos tōn mellontōn agathōn ouk autēn tēn eikona tōn pragmatōn kat eniauton tais autais thysiais as prospherousin eis to diēnekes oudepote dynatai tous proserchomenous teleiōsai
epei an epausanto prospheromenai dia to mēdemian echein eti syneidēsin amartiōn tous latreuontas apax kekatharmenous
all en autais anamnēsis amartiōn kat eniauton
adynaton gar aima taurōn kai tragōn aphairein amartias
dio eiserchomenos eis ton kosmon legei thysian kai prosphoran ouk ēthelēsas sōma de katērtisō moi
olokautōmata kai peri amartias ouk eudokēsas
tote eipon idou ēkō en kephalidi bibliou gegraptai peri emou tou poiēsai o theos to thelēma sou
anōteron legōn oti thysian kai prosphoran kai olokautōmata kai peri amartias ouk ēthelēsas oude eudokēsas aitines kata ton nomon prospherontai
tote eirēken idou ēkō tou poiēsai o theos to thelēma sou anairei to prōton ina to deuteron stēsē
en ō thelēmati ēgiasmenoi esmen dia tēs prosphoras tou sōmatos tou iēsou christou ephapax
kai pas men iereus estēken kath ēmeran leitourgōn kai tas autas pollakis prospherōn thysias aitines oudepote dynantai perielein amartias
autos de mian yper amartiōn prosenenkas thysian eis to diēnekes ekathisen en dexia tou theou
to loipon ekdechomenos eōs tethōsin oi echthroi autou ypopodion tōn podōn autou
mia gar prosphora teteleiōken eis to diēnekes tous agiazomenous
martyrei de ēmin kai to pneuma to agion meta gar to proeirēkenai
autē ē diathēkē ēn diathēsomai pros autous meta tas ēmeras ekeinas legei kyrios didous nomous mou epi kardias autōn kai epi tōn dianoiōn autōn epigrapsō autous
kai tōn amartiōn autōn kai tōn anomiōn autōn ou mē mnēsthō eti
opou de aphesis toutōn ouketi prosphora peri amartias
echontes oun adelphoi parrēsian eis tēn eisodon tōn agiōn en tō aimati iēsou
ēn enekainisen ēmin odon prosphaton kai zōsan dia tou katapetasmatos tout estin tēs sarkos autou
kai ierea megan epi ton oikon tou theou
proserchōmetha meta alēthinēs kardias en plērophoria pisteōs errantismenoi tas kardias apo syneidēseōs ponēras kai leloumenoi to sōma ydati katharō
katechōmen tēn omologian tēs elpidos aklinē pistos gar o epangeilamenos
kai katanoōmen allēlous eis paroxysmon agapēs kai kalōn ergōn
mē enkataleipontes tēn episynagōgēn eautōn kathōs ethos tisin alla parakalountes kai tosoutō mallon osō blepete engizousan tēn ēmeran
ekousiōs gar amartanontōn ēmōn meta to labein tēn epignōsin tēs alētheias ouketi peri amartiōn apoleipetai thysia
phobera de tis ekdochē kriseōs kai pyros zēlos esthiein mellontos tous ypenantious
athetēsas tis nomon mōseōs chōris oiktirmōn epi dysin ē trisin martysin apothnēskei
posō dokeite cheironos axiōthēsetai timōrias o ton uion tou theou katapatēsas kai to aima tēs diathēkēs koinon ēgēsamenos en ō ēgiasthē kai to pneuma tēs charitos enybrisas
oidamen gar ton eiponta emoi ekdikēsis egō antapodōsō legei kyrios kai palin kyrios krinei ton laon autou
phoberon to empesein eis cheiras theou zōntos
anamimnēskesthe de tas proteron ēmeras en ais phōtisthentes pollēn athlēsin ypemeinate pathēmatōn
touto men oneidismois te kai thlipsesin theatrizomenoi touto de koinōnoi tōn outōs anastrephomenōn genēthentes
kai gar tois desmois mou synepathēsate kai tēn arpagēn tōn yparchontōn ymōn meta charas prosedexasthe ginōskontes echein en eautois kreittona yparxin en ouranois kai menousan
mē apobalēte oun tēn parrēsian ymōn ētis echei misthapodosian megalēn
ypomonēs gar echete chreian ina to thelēma tou theou poiēsantes komisēsthe tēn epangelian
eti gar mikron oson oson o erchomenos ēxei kai ou chroniei
o de dikaios ek pisteōs zēsetai kai ean yposteilētai ouk eudokei ē psychē mou en autō
ēmeis de ouk esmen ypostolēs eis apōleian alla pisteōs eis peripoiēsin psychēs
estin de pistis elpizomenōn ypostasis pragmatōn elenchos ou blepomenōn
en tautē gar emartyrēthēsan oi presbyteroi
pistei nooumen katērtisthai tous aiōnas rēmati theou eis to mē ek phainomenōn ta blepomena gegonenai
pistei pleiona thysian abel para kain prosēnenken tō theō di ēs emartyrēthē einai dikaios martyrountos epi tois dōrois autou tou theou kai di autēs apothanōn eti laleitai
pistei enōch metetethē tou mē idein thanaton kai ouch eurisketo dioti metethēken auton o theos pro gar tēs metatheseōs autou memartyrētai euērestēkenai tō theō
chōris de pisteōs adynaton euarestēsai pisteusai gar dei ton proserchomenon tō theō oti estin kai tois ekzētousin auton misthapodotēs ginetai
pistei chrēmatistheis nōe peri tōn mēdepō blepomenōn eulabētheis kateskeuasen kibōton eis sōtērian tou oikou autou di ēs katekrinen ton kosmon kai tēs kata pistin dikaiosynēs egeneto klēronomos
pistei kaloumenos abraam ypēkousen exelthein eis ton topon on ēmellen lambanein eis klēronomian kai exēlthen mē epistamenos pou erchetai
pistei parōkēsen eis tēn gēn tēs epangelias ōs allotrian en skēnais katoikēsas meta isaak kai iakōb tōn synklēronomōn tēs epangelias tēs autēs
exedecheto gar tēn tous themelious echousan polin ēs technitēs kai dēmiourgos o theos
pistei kai autē sarra dynamin eis katabolēn spermatos elaben kai para kairon ēlikias eteken epei piston ēgēsato ton epangeilamenon
dio kai aph enos egennēthēsan kai tauta nenekrōmenou kathōs ta astra tou ouranou tō plēthei kai ōsei ammos ē para to cheilos tēs thalassēs ē anarithmētos
kata pistin apethanon outoi pantes mē labontes tas epangelias alla porrōthen autas idontes kai peisthentes kai aspasamenoi kai omologēsantes oti xenoi kai parepidēmoi eisin epi tēs gēs
oi gar toiauta legontes emphanizousin oti patrida epizētousin
kai ei men ekeinēs emnēmoneuon aph ēs exēlthon eichon an kairon anakampsai
nyni de kreittonos oregontai tout estin epouraniou dio ouk epaischynetai autous o theos theos epikaleisthai autōn ētoimasen gar autois polin
pistei prosenēnochen abraam ton isaak peirazomenos kai ton monogenē prosepheren o tas epangelias anadexamenos
pros on elalēthē oti en isaak klēthēsetai soi sperma
logisamenos oti kai ek nekrōn egeirein dynatos o theos othen auton kai en parabolē ekomisato
pistei peri mellontōn eulogēsen isaak ton iakōb kai ton ēsau
pistei iakōb apothnēskōn ekaston tōn uiōn iōsēph eulogēsen kai prosekynēsen epi to akron tēs rabdou autou
pistei iōsēph teleutōn peri tēs exodou tōn uiōn israēl emnēmoneusen kai peri tōn osteōn autou eneteilato
pistei mōsēs gennētheis ekrybē trimēnon ypo tōn paterōn autou dioti eidon asteion to paidion kai ouk ephobēthēsan to diatagma tou basileōs
pistei mōsēs megas genomenos ērnēsato legesthai uios thygatros pharaō
mallon elomenos synkakoucheisthai tō laō tou theou ē proskairon echein amartias apolausin
meizona plouton ēgēsamenos tōn en aigyptō thēsaurōn ton oneidismon tou christou apeblepen gar eis tēn misthapodosian
pistei katelipen aigypton mē phobētheis ton thymon tou basileōs ton gar aoraton ōs orōn ekarterēsen
pistei pepoiēken to pascha kai tēn proschysin tou aimatos ina mē o olothreuōn ta prōtotoka thigē autōn
pistei diebēsan tēn erythran thalassan ōs dia xēras ēs peiran labontes oi aigyptioi katepothēsan
pistei ta teichē ierichō epesen kyklōthenta epi epta ēmeras
pistei raab ē pornē ou synapōleto tois apeithēsasin dexamenē tous kataskopous met eirēnēs
kai ti eti legō epileipsei gar me diēgoumenon o chronos peri gedeōn barak te kai sampsōn kai iephthae dabid te kai samouēl kai tōn prophētōn
oi dia pisteōs katēgōnisanto basileias eirgasanto dikaiosynēn epetychon epangeliōn ephraxan stomata leontōn
esbesan dynamin pyros ephygon stomata machairas enedynamōthēsan apo astheneias egenēthēsan ischyroi en polemō parembolas eklinan allotriōn
elabon gynaikes ex anastaseōs tous nekrous autōn alloi de etympanisthēsan ou prosdexamenoi tēn apolytrōsin ina kreittonos anastaseōs tychōsin
eteroi de empaigmōn kai mastigōn peiran elabon eti de desmōn kai phylakēs
elithasthēsan epristhēsan epeirasthēsan en phonō machairas apethanon periēlthon en mēlōtais en aigeiois dermasin ysteroumenoi thlibomenoi kakouchoumenoi
ōn ouk ēn axios o kosmos en erēmiais planōmenoi kai oresin kai spēlaiois kai tais opais tēs gēs
kai outoi pantes martyrēthentes dia tēs pisteōs ouk ekomisanto tēn epangelian
tou theou peri ēmōn kreitton ti problepsamenou ina mē chōris ēmōn teleiōthōsin
toigaroun kai ēmeis tosouton echontes perikeimenon ēmin nephos martyrōn onkon apothemenoi panta kai tēn euperistaton amartian di ypomonēs trechōmen ton prokeimenon ēmin agōna
aphorōntes eis ton tēs pisteōs archēgon kai teleiōtēn iēsoun os anti tēs prokeimenēs autō charas ypemeinen stauron aischynēs kataphronēsas en dexia te tou thronou tou theou ekathisen
analogisasthe gar ton toiautēn ypomemenēkota ypo tōn amartōlōn eis auton antilogian ina mē kamēte tais psychais ymōn eklyomenoi
oupō mechris aimatos antikatestēte pros tēn amartian antagōnizomenoi
kai eklelēsthe tēs paraklēseōs ētis ymin ōs uiois dialegetai uie mou mē oligōrei paideias kyriou mēde eklyou yp autou elenchomenos
on gar agapa kyrios paideuei mastigoi de panta uion on paradechetai
ei paideian ypomenete ōs uiois ymin prospheretai o theos tis gar estin uios on ou paideuei patēr
ei de chōris este paideias ēs metochoi gegonasin pantes ara nothoi este kai ouch uioi
eita tous men tēs sarkos ēmōn pateras eichomen paideutas kai entrepometha ou pollō mallon ypotagēsometha tō patri tōn pneumatōn kai zēsomen
oi men gar pros oligas ēmeras kata to dokoun autois epaideuon o de epi to sympheron eis to metalabein tēs agiotētos autou
pasa de paideia pros men to paron ou dokei charas einai alla lypēs ysteron de karpon eirēnikon tois di autēs gegymnasmenois apodidōsin dikaiosynēs
dio tas pareimenas cheiras kai ta paralelymena gonata anorthōsate
kai trochias orthas poiēsate tois posin ymōn ina mē to chōlon ektrapē iathē de mallon
eirēnēn diōkete meta pantōn kai ton agiasmon ou chōris oudeis opsetai ton kyrion
episkopountes mē tis ysterōn apo tēs charitos tou theou mē tis riza pikrias anō phyousa enochlē kai dia tautēs mianthōsin polloi
mē tis pornos ē bebēlos ōs ēsau os anti brōseōs mias apedoto ta prōtotokia autou
iste gar oti kai metepeita thelōn klēronomēsai tēn eulogian apedokimasthē metanoias gar topon ouch euren kaiper meta dakryōn ekzētēsas autēn
ou gar proselēlythate psēlaphōmenō orei kai kekaumenō pyri kai gnophō kai skotō kai thyellē
kai salpingos ēchō kai phōnē rēmatōn ēs oi akousantes parētēsanto mē prostethēnai autois logon
ouk epheron gar to diastellomenon kan thērion thigē tou orous lithobolēthēsetai ē bolidi katatoxeuthēsetai
kai outōs phoberon ēn to phantazomenon mōsēs eipen ekphobos eimi kai entromos
alla proselēlythate siōn orei kai polei theou zōntos ierousalēm epouraniō kai myriasin angelōn
panēgyrei kai ekklēsia prōtotokōn en ouranois apogegrammenōn kai kritē theō pantōn kai pneumasin dikaiōn teteleiōmenōn
kai diathēkēs neas mesitē iēsou kai aimati rantismou kreittona lalounti para ton abel
blepete mē paraitēsēsthe ton lalounta ei gar ekeinoi ouk ephygon ton epi tēs gēs paraitēsamenoi chrēmatizonta pollō mallon ēmeis oi ton ap ouranōn apostrephomenoi
ou ē phōnē tēn gēn esaleusen tote nyn de epēngeltai legōn eti apax egō seiō ou monon tēn gēn alla kai ton ouranon
to de eti apax dēloi tōn saleuomenōn tēn metathesin ōs pepoiēmenōn ina meinē ta mē saleuomena
dio basileian asaleuton paralambanontes echōmen charin di ēs latreuōmen euarestōs tō theō meta aidous kai eulabeias
kai gar o theos ēmōn pyr katanaliskon
ē philadelphia menetō
tēs philoxenias mē epilanthanesthe dia tautēs gar elathon tines xenisantes angelous
mimnēskesthe tōn desmiōn ōs syndedemenoi tōn kakouchoumenōn ōs kai autoi ontes en sōmati
timios o gamos en pasin kai ē koitē amiantos pornous de kai moichous krinei o theos
aphilargyros o tropos arkoumenoi tois parousin autos gar eirēken ou mē se anō oud ou mē se enkatalipō
ōste tharrountas ēmas legein kyrios emoi boēthos kai ou phobēthēsomai ti poiēsei moi anthrōpos
mnēmoneuete tōn ēgoumenōn ymōn oitines elalēsan ymin ton logon tou theou ōn anatheōrountes tēn ekbasin tēs anastrophēs mimeisthe tēn pistin
iēsous christos chthes kai sēmeron o autos kai eis tous aiōnas
didachais poikilais kai xenais mē peripheresthe kalon gar chariti bebaiousthai tēn kardian ou brōmasin en ois ouk ōphelēthēsan oi peripatēsantes
echomen thysiastērion ex ou phagein ouk echousin exousian oi tē skēnē latreuontes
ōn gar eispheretai zōōn to aima peri amartias eis ta agia dia tou archiereōs toutōn ta sōmata katakaietai exō tēs parembolēs
dio kai iēsous ina agiasē dia tou idiou aimatos ton laon exō tēs pylēs epathen
toinyn exerchōmetha pros auton exō tēs parembolēs ton oneidismon autou pherontes
ou gar echomen ōde menousan polin alla tēn mellousan epizētoumen
di autou oun anapherōmen thysian aineseōs diapantos tō theō tout estin karpon cheileōn omologountōn tō onomati autou
tēs de eupoiias kai koinōnias mē epilanthanesthe toiautais gar thysiais euaresteitai o theos
peithesthe tois ēgoumenois ymōn kai ypeikete autoi gar agrypnousin yper tōn psychōn ymōn ōs logon apodōsontes ina meta charas touto poiōsin kai mē stenazontes alysiteles gar ymin touto
proseuchesthe peri ēmōn pepoithamen gar oti kalēn syneidēsin echomen en pasin kalōs thelontes anastrephesthai
perissoterōs de parakalō touto poiēsai ina tachion apokatastathō ymin
o de theos tēs eirēnēs o anagagōn ek nekrōn ton poimena tōn probatōn ton megan en aimati diathēkēs aiōniou ton kyrion ēmōn iēsoun
katartisai ymas en panti ergō agathō eis to poiēsai to thelēma autou poiōn en ymin to euareston enōpion autou dia iēsou christou ō ē doxa eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn amēn
parakalō de ymas adelphoi anechesthe tou logou tēs paraklēseōs kai gar dia bracheōn epesteila ymin
ginōskete ton adelphon timotheon apolelymenon meth ou ean tachion erchētai opsomai ymas
aspasasthe pantas tous ēgoumenous ymōn kai pantas tous agious aspazontai ymas oi apo tēs italias
ē charis meta pantōn ymōn amēn [pros ebraious egraphē apo tēs italias dia timotheou]
